data.title: Add CORS configuration helper
data.description:
**Labels:** `documentation`, `enhancement`

**Description:**
Create a helper script or guide to easily configure CORS for external frontend deployments.

**Proposed Solution:**
Add CORS configuration generator and documentation.

**Features:**

* Interactive CORS setup script
* Environment variable templates
* Validation of CORS settings
* Security best practices guide

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Script to configure CORS settings
- [ ] Clear documentation in [DEPLOYMENT.md](<http://DEPLOYMENT.md>)
- [ ] Environment variable examples
- [ ] Security warnings and best practices
- [ ] Testing guide for CORS

**Technical Considerations:**

* Add CORS middleware to Worker
* Create setup script (interactive CLI)
* Document common CORS issues
* Add troubleshooting section
* Include security considerations

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Low** (documentation, simple script, middleware config)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Low** (straightforward config and documentation work)
* 💎 Value: **Low-Medium** (helpful for deployment, reduces setup friction)
